package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for missing_context_propagation: Functions that already accept context.Context but still call context-free stdlib APIs like http.Get or exec.Command.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: context; severity: contextual.
func scenario242Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(context.Background(), http.MethodGet, url, nil)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
}
